description: Nuclear Fission Process. This nuclear physics process visualization demonstrates nuclear fission and chain reactions. The flowchart shows fissionable inputs and neutron bombardment, nuclear fission methods and fission reactions, nuclear fission operations and fission products, intermediate results, and final nuclear fission outputs.
mermaid:
graph TD

C3[Neutron Bombardment] --> D3[Fission Reaction]
E3[Fission Products] --> F3[Nuclear Fission Analysis]
B3 --> G3[Uranium 235]
D3 --> H3[Plutonium 239]
F3 --> I3[Fission Energy]

H3 --> K3[Fission Rate]

J3 --> M3[Fission Yield]

L3 --> N3[Fission Efficiency]

P3 --> R3[Nuclear Fission Validation]
Q3 --> S3[Nuclear Fission Verification]
R3 --> T3[Nuclear Fission Result]
S3 --> U3[Nuclear Fission Analysis]
T3 --> V3[Nuclear Fission Parameters]
U3 --> W3[Nuclear Fission Output]
V3 --> X3[Nuclear Fission Analysis]
W3 --> Y3[Nuclear Fission Final Result]
X3 --> Z3[Nuclear Fission Complete]
